sessions.notes: XLE exit price corrected to actual broker fill 0.38 (journal recorded 0.36). DIA EOD exit order expired unfilled at broker close 2026-06-15; carried over and resolved 2026-06-16 (Session 7 startup) via max_hold exit, actual fill $1.95, realized_pnl=+$15.00, attributed to this (S6) session per Phase 2 carryover handling. Session remains data_clean=FALSE due to original EOD-exit fill-recording defect and cross-session resolution; trades are accurate and fully reconciled.

Zero-trade session — scanner operated normally for all 360 cycles (09:30–12:30 ET) but rvol < 0.50 across all 27 symbols throughout the session (peak: AVGO 0.472 ~10:42 ET). low_volume_chop gate blocked all 180 candidate rejections across 35 periodic re-scans. No positions opened, no orders submitted, no broker state. data_clean=TRUE (no fills to verify). Phase 2 valid zero-trade session. Note: this is the official Session 7; the prior 2026-06-16 attempt was invalidated due to sandbox VM reboot and is excluded from evaluation.

Exit prices corrected from broker-confirmed fills (marketable_limit mode). AAPL: limit 0.64 → fill 0.66 (+2, pnl -14→-12). PLTR: limit 0.94 → fill 0.97 (+3, pnl +22→+25). DIA: limit 0.31 → fill 0.33 (+2, pnl -22→-20). Corrected session pnl: -7.00. Same exit price recording defect (deferred per Phase 2 protocol).
